name: NOAA Space Weather
author: Dashboard Matrix Project
description: Native NOAA SWPC widgets using official JSON data services instead of blocked website iframes.

widgets.name: Space Weather Summary
widgets.description: Kp, R/S/G scales, X-ray flux, solar wind and Bz in one native tile.

widgets.name: Planetary Kp and Forecast
widgets.description: Current planetary Kp, condition and latest Kp forecast.

widgets.name: NOAA Storm Scales
widgets.description: Current R, S and G space-weather scales.

widgets.name: Real-Time Solar Wind
widgets.description: Solar-wind speed, density, temperature, Bt and Bz from NOAA real-time feeds.

widgets.name: GOES X-Ray Flux
widgets.description: Current GOES 0.1–0.8 nm X-ray flux and derived flare class.

widgets.name: SWPC Alerts
widgets.description: Recent NOAA SWPC alerts and warnings. Configure alert_limit in plugin settings.
